title: Todos somos necesarios
writer: Faustino González Aller, José Antonio Nieves Conde, Roberto Savarese
actors: Alberto Closas, Folco Lulli, José Marco Davó
plot: After serving their sentence, three prisoners, a doctor, a civil servant and a thief, leave jail. During the train trip they do together to return home, they analyze their respective lives. The doctor has been required to perform ...
